title: VoiceBox
longdescription:
Medium & Tools: Digital, Illustrator

Dimensions: Unlisted

This was a promotional project focused on bringing new users interested in the voice acting industry, looking for a place to learn and experience more of the voice acting world, while listing the exacting goals VoiceBox aims to fill, sticking with the the same fonts and utilizing the overall shape of the VoiceBox logo as a recurring and varied pattern to visually connect the ad back to the brand through more than just type and ad a full but clean visual appeal.

VoiceBox is a company focused on helping people take their first step into the voice acting world, by educating and providing the basic necessities for any aspiring voice actor to their home.
